context: Evaluates whether the agent uses the `in` operator for membership checks (use-in-operator Regal rule) rather than iterating with `x := collection[_]` and comparing.

checklist.name: Uses `in` operator for membership check
checklist.description: The policy checks department membership using `dept in allowed_departments` (or equivalent `in` form) — not `dept == allowed_departments[_]` or `allowed_departments[_] == dept`

checklist.name: Looks up allowed departments from data
checklist.description: The allowed departments for a path are read from `data.endpoint_access[input.path]` (or equivalent data lookup)

checklist.name: import rego.v1 and default allow := false
checklist.description: The policy includes `import rego.v1` and `default allow := false`

checklist.name: Tests pass
checklist.description: All tests pass when running `opa test . -v`
